scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ufcv/api" "npm run dev -w @ufcv/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ufcv/shared && npm run build -w @ufcv/api && npm run build -w @ufcv/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ufcv/api && npm run lint -w @ufcv/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ufcv/api && npm run test -w @ufcv/web
